ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the chart is associated with */,
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size system used in the chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the chart (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_system_id") REFERENCES size_systems ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the size system (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size detail */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., 2, 4, 6) */,
  "bust_inch" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_inch" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands_categories" (
  "brand_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand-category relationship */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_categories_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a size chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_versions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_system_id_src" INTEGER /* ID of the source size system */,
  "size_system_id_dst" INTEGER /* ID of the destination size system */,
  "size_src" TEXT /* Size in the source system */,
  "size_dst" TEXT /* Size in the destination system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_system_id_src FOREIGN KEY ("size_system_id_src") REFERENCES size_systems ("size_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_system_id_dst FOREIGN KEY ("size_system_id_dst") REFERENCES size_systems ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES chart_versions ("version_id")
)
